name: agent-budget
description: Local-first context and cost controls for coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Reduce coding-agent context waste with dossiers, budgeted reads, and summarized logs.
interface.longDescription: Agent Budget gives Codex a local MCP server for repo indexing, task dossiers, budgeted file reads, command summaries, diff summaries, and token-cost reports.
defaultPrompt: Use Agent Budget for this coding task.
Create a task dossier before reading files.
Compare the token cost of this change.
